name: Cathode UI
description: Retro-future design system — monospace, pixel shapes, motion + haptics + sound + AI-native surfaces. Read this manifest to understand how to compose Cathode primitives without scraping React source.
themeSelection: CSS `prefers-color-scheme`, overridable via <html data-theme='dark|light'> or <CathodeProvider theme='dark|light'>.

components.name: TerminalFrame
components.summary: Bordered box with a small inset title — the "┌─ PEERS ─" terminal look. Use to group related readouts.
components.whenToUse: Group a named section of readouts or controls with a visible label — the "┌─ PEERS ─" terminal section.

vs.picker: TerminalFrame when the section needs a visible name; Card when content speaks for itself.

components.name: Card
components.summary: Generic bordered panel — same chrome as TerminalFrame without the inset title. Use for readouts, info blocks, or grouped form fields where the content speaks for itself.

props.name: surface
props.description: `elevated` uses panel bg; `flat` is transparent.

props.name: onClick
props.description: When set, the Card renders as a focusable button.

requires: aria-label if clickable and children are icon-only

components.whenToUse: Wrap any content in a bordered panel without a label — info blocks, grouped form fields, composable widgets.

vs.picker: Card when you don't need an inset title; TerminalFrame when you do.
Card for freeform content; StatusTile for the standard icon + title + subtitle pattern.

components.name: PixelBar
components.summary: Discrete-cell horizontal level meter. Fill proportional to `level` (0–1).

props.name: level
props.description: Clamped to [0, 1].

props.name: fill
props.description: CSS color; overrides --cathode-pixelbar-fill.

components.whenToUse: Show a real-time VU-meter-style level (volume, signal intensity) as discrete pixel cells.

vs.picker: PixelBar for discrete level meters; ProgressBar for continuous determinate progress (e.g. download %).
PixelBar for a known level 0–1; ActivityBar for pseudo-random "something is happening" animation.

components.name: PulsingDot
components.summary: Small square that pulses to signal "active/listening" without a full progress indicator.
components.whenToUse: Attach a small live-status signal to a label or row — LIVE / SCANNING / ONLINE.

vs.picker: PulsingDot for an abstract status indicator; Avatar's status dot when it's tied to a specific person.
PulsingDot for live animated state; Badge for static labels (NEW / BETA).

components.name: DotLeader
components.summary: "LABEL …………… VALUE" row — classic terminal readout. Dots fill available width.

props.name: valueColor
props.description: CSS color for the value half.

components.whenToUse: Render a single LABEL ……… VALUE row inside a TerminalFrame, Card, or stack of readouts.

vs.picker: DotLeader for 1–8 rows of key/value pairs; Table for multi-column tabular data.

components.name: Pill
components.summary: Icon+text nav/action button. `active` marks the current tab; pass an icon node for the icon+text treatment.

props.name: active
props.description: Marks the current tab/state; visually highlights and disables click.

props.name: feedback
props.description: Local override for haptic+sound.

components.whenToUse: A compact icon+text button used for navigation, filters, or tabs — anything with a persistent `active` state.

vs.picker: Pill when the button represents persistent state (current tab, selected filter); Button for one-shot actions (Save, Delete).
Pill is tappable and can be active; Tag is a static label (optionally removable).
Pill for nav; Chips for a scrolling row of preset phrases inserted once then cleared.

components.name: Button
components.summary: General-purpose button. Variants: default / primary / danger. Supports declarative AI actions.

props.name: ai
props.description: Declarative AI intent; provider is routed from CathodeProvider.

components.whenToUse: Fire a one-shot action — submit, delete, cancel, run. Use `variant` for semantic weight and `ai={{ action }}` for AI-routed intents.

vs.picker: Button for one-shot actions; Pill for nav/filter state.
Single Button for one action; Menu when the button reveals a list of actions.

components.name: TextField
components.summary: Monospace text input. With `ai={{ suggest: true }}` shows ghost-text AI completions (Tab to accept).

props.name: weight
props.description: Font weight of the typed text.

components.whenToUse: Single-line free-text input. Add `ai={{ suggest: true }}` for inline ghost-text AI completion.

vs.picker: TextField for single-line; TextArea for multi-line.
TextField for free-form numbers you want the user to type; Counter for bounded values nudged with arrow buttons.
TextField for a free-form value; SearchBar when you want a results dropdown under the input.

components.name: StatusTile
components.summary: MPC-style tile: icon + uppercase title + tiny subtitle. Optional tappable.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Makes the whole tile a press target.

examples.name: display
examples.snippet: <StatusTile title="STATUS" subtitle="HEALTHY" icon={<IconCheck weight="bold" />} active accent="success" />

examples.name: button
examples.snippet: <StatusTile title="ACTION" subtitle="TAP TO RUN" icon={<IconSparkle />} onClick={handler} />

components.whenToUse: Render an MPC-style icon + title + subtitle tile in a grid of statuses or shortcut entry points.

vs.picker: StatusTile for the fixed icon/title/subtitle pattern; Card for custom content.
StatusTile is a chunky tile in a grid; Pill is a compact inline button.

examples.name: display
examples.snippet: <StatusTile title="STATUS" subtitle="HEALTHY" icon={<IconCheck weight="bold" />} active accent="success" />

examples.name: button
examples.snippet: <StatusTile title="ACTION" subtitle="TAP TO RUN" icon={<IconSparkle />} onClick={handler} />

components.name: ActivityBar
components.summary: Pseudo-random "activity" meter — pixel cells flicker based on a deterministic seed (advance externally to animate).

props.name: intensity
props.description: Probability a cell is lit (0–1).

components.whenToUse: Show a "traffic / activity / thinking" indicator where the exact level is meaningless — deterministic pseudo-random per seed.

vs.picker: ActivityBar for decorative/indeterminate activity; PixelBar for a real quantitative level.
ActivityBar is part of a UI readout; Loader is a standalone "please wait" indicator.

components.name: HazardStripes
components.summary: Decorative diagonal-stripe overlay for "caution" / "armed" states. Wraps children.
components.whenToUse: Wrap a destructive or high-stakes button/zone in a caution overlay — "ARMED · HOLD TO FIRE", emergency stop zones.

vs.picker: Button danger for standard destructive buttons; HazardStripes adds the extra visual weight for irreversible / armed states.

components.name: Toggle
components.summary: Binary on/off switch with square-cornered track and accent fill when on.
components.whenToUse: Flip a single setting on/off that takes effect immediately — notifications, dark mode, debug overlays.

vs.picker: Toggle for immediate settings; Checkbox for form values in a list (multi-select, indeterminate).

components.name: Counter
components.summary: Numeric rocker "[−] LABEL VALUE [+]" — fused label/arrows read as one control. (Formerly named Stepper.)
components.whenToUse: Let the user nudge a bounded numeric value up/down — WPM, volume, count. Discrete steps, welded label.

vs.picker: Counter for bounded integer-ish values; TextField for free-form numbers.
Counter for a range; Select for a finite enum.

components.name: Chips
components.summary: Horizontally scrolling row of tappable preset chips. Supports grouped layouts with dividers.

props.name: groups
props.description: Flat list or grouped arrays.

components.whenToUse: Render a horizontally-scrolling row of preset phrases the user inserts once — quick-replies, preset commands, saved filters.

vs.picker: Chips for one-shot inserts that clear; Tabs for switching which view is active.
Chips for a scroll row of presets; Pill for a single nav/action button.
Chips are tappable actions; Tag is a display-only label (optionally removable).

components.name: SearchBar
components.summary: Monospace search input. With `ai={{ semantic: true }}` routes query + items through provider.act("search", …) for AI ranking.

props.name: icon
props.description: `true` → built-in "⌕" glyph (default). `false` → no icon. Pass a ReactNode to supply your own (e.g. Phosphor IconSearch).

components.whenToUse: Search/filter across a known dataset with a results dropdown. Toggle `ai={{ semantic: true }}` for provider-ranked results.

vs.picker: SearchBar for fuzzy search over a large/unknown set; Select for a finite enum picker.
SearchBar when you need a results dropdown; TextField for free text with no suggestions.

components.name: Dialog
components.summary: Modal with TerminalFrame chrome. Portal-rendered, ESC + backdrop click to close (unless `modal`).

props.name: modal
props.description: Disable click-outside-to-close.

components.whenToUse: Block the UI until the user confirms, chooses, or dismisses — destructive confirmations, wizards, full-form panels.

vs.picker: Dialog for centered modal focus; Drawer for a side/top/bottom panel that doesn't fully cover the page.
Dialog is modal and portaled; Popover is anchored and non-modal.

components.name: Chat
components.summary: First-class AI conversation component with streaming, cancel, and auto-scroll. Wraps a CathodeAIProvider.

props.name: provider
props.description: Overrides the provider from CathodeProvider.

components.whenToUse: Drop in a ready-made AI conversation UI — streaming assistant text, send/cancel, auto-scroll, hooked to a `CathodeAIProvider`.

vs.picker: Chat for conversational back-and-forth; TextField for a single AI-suggested completion.

components.name: Checkbox
components.summary: Binary form checkbox for multi-select values. Distinct from Toggle; supports indeterminate (tri-state).

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Renders a dash — use for parent rows of mixed children.

components.whenToUse: A boolean form value inside a list of related options — multi-select filters, agreement boxes, parent-of-children rows.

vs.picker: Checkbox for form values you submit; Toggle for immediate-effect settings.
Checkbox for multi-select (any can be on); RadioGroup for single-select (exactly one).

components.name: RadioGroup
components.summary: Single-select from 2+ options. Renders native radios under the hood; browser handles keyboard arrow-nav.

props.name: name
props.description: Shared form name. Auto-generated if omitted.

requires: aria-label or aria-labelledby for the group

components.whenToUse: Pick exactly one option from 2–5 visible alternatives — mode, region, plan tier.

vs.picker: RadioGroup when all options should be visible at once; Select when the list is long or space is tight.
RadioGroup for single-select; Checkbox for multi-select.
RadioGroup for form values you submit; Tabs for switching which view is shown.

components.name: Select
components.summary: Single-select dropdown for a finite option set. Wraps native <select> for a11y + mobile-picker compatibility.
components.whenToUse: Pick one value from a finite enum when options are many or space is tight — theme, region, unit.

vs.picker: Select for long/hidden lists; RadioGroup when showing all options helps the user compare.
Select for finite enums; SearchBar for fuzzy matching over an open set.

components.name: TextArea
components.summary: Multi-line monospace text input. Resize handle disabled by default to match the terminal chrome.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Shows a character counter below when set.

props.name: weight
props.description: Font weight of the typed text.

components.whenToUse: Multi-line free-text input — notes, descriptions, bios. Optional character counter when `maxLength` is set.

vs.picker: TextArea for multi-line; TextField for single-line.

components.name: FormField
components.summary: Stacks a label, a Cathode input, and an optional hint or error message. Auto-wires aria attributes.

props.name: children
props.description: Single Cathode input.

props.name: error
props.description: Swaps the hint slot and turns the label danger-red.

props.name: required
props.description: Renders a "*" next to the label.

components.whenToUse: Wrap any Cathode input (TextField, TextArea, Select, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Toggle, Counter) with a label, hint, and/or error message — auto-wires aria attributes.

vs.picker: FormField error for inline validation beside the input; Toast for out-of-band global notices.

components.name: Badge
components.summary: Small inline marker for status/state — "NEW", "BETA", "PRO". Display-only; solid (filled) or outline variants.
components.whenToUse: Attach a small inline status marker to text — NEW, BETA, v0.3.0, DEPRECATED. Display-only.

vs.picker: Badge for status labels (solid fill by default, display-only); Tag for keywords/filters (outlined, optional remove).
Badge for static status text; PulsingDot for live animated state dot.

components.name: Tag
components.summary: Accent-colored outlined marker for keywords, filters, or classifications. Optional `onRemove` renders a trailing × button.

props.name: onRemove
props.description: When set, renders a close button after the label.

props.name: removeLabel
props.description: ARIA label for the remove button.

components.whenToUse: Classify or filter with an accent-colored keyword marker — categories, tech stack, people. Optional × to remove.

vs.picker: Tag for keyword/filter labels (often removable); Badge for status markers (display-only).
Tag represents a classification; Chips is an interactive row of preset phrases.

components.name: Avatar
components.summary: Square identity marker — image, initials fallback, optional status dot.

props.name: name
props.description: Source for initials fallback.

props.name: children
props.description: Custom content (icon, emoji). Falls back to initials.

requires: alt or name for image variant

components.whenToUse: Identify a person or entity — image or initials fallback in a square, optional presence dot.

vs.picker: Avatar represents a person; StatusTile represents a named system or app surface.

components.name: Kbd
components.summary: Keyboard shortcut indicator — each key in its own bordered box, joined by a separator.

props.name: keys
props.description: String ("Ctrl+K") is split on + or -. Pass an array for keys that literally contain "+".

components.whenToUse: Display a keyboard shortcut alongside a menu item, tooltip, or docs reference — Cmd+K, Ctrl+Shift+S.

vs.picker: Kbd for keyboard keys; CodeBlock for code.

components.name: CodeBlock
components.summary: Multi-line code sample with optional language label and copy button. Pass `html` for pre-highlighted code (Shiki/Highlight.js).

props.name: code
props.description: Plain-text code. Ignored when `html` is passed.

props.name: html
props.description: Pre-rendered highlighted HTML.

requires: pre is focusable (tabindex=0) for keyboard scroll

components.whenToUse: Show a multi-line code sample in docs, prompt previews, or debug panels. Accepts plain text or pre-highlighted HTML (Shiki / Highlight.js).

vs.picker: CodeBlock for multi-line; inline `<code>` for single terms in prose.

components.name: Table
components.summary: Terminal-style tabular display. Controlled sort via onSortChange; optional row-click with keyboard support.

props.name: onSortChange
props.description: Emitted when a sortable header is clicked. Consumer supplies sorted rows.

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Makes each row focusable + Enter/Space activatable.

props.name: showCaption
props.description: Visually show the caption above the table.

components.whenToUse: Show structured tabular data — columns, rows, optional sort, optional row-click. Consumer controls the sort state.

vs.picker: Table for multi-column data; DotLeader for a handful of key/value rows.

components.name: Tabs
components.summary: Horizontal tabs where exactly one is active. Controlled via value + onChange.
components.whenToUse: Switch between related views without leaving the page — Overview / Logs / Settings. Persistent active state.

vs.picker: Tabs for switching which view is shown; RadioGroup for form values you submit.
Tabs for a compact tab row with underline; Pill for standalone nav buttons.
Tabs for persistent view state; Chips for one-shot preset phrases.

components.name: Breadcrumbs
components.summary: Path-style navigation. The last item is marked `aria-current="page"` and rendered as static text.
components.whenToUse: Show the user's location inside a nested hierarchy — Home › Docs › Tabs. Last item is the current page.

vs.picker: Breadcrumbs shows *where you are* in a hierarchy; Tabs switches between *peer* views.

components.name: Menu
components.summary: Click-triggered dropdown of actions. Keyboard-navigable (ArrowUp/Down, Enter, Escape).

props.name: trigger
props.description: Usually a Button or icon.

props.name: items
props.type: Array<{label, onSelect, disabled?, shortcut?, kind?, divider?}>

requires: aria-haspopup + aria-expanded set automatically on trigger

components.whenToUse: Reveal a list of actions from a click trigger — context menu, overflow menu, "More actions" dropdown. Keyboard-navigable.

vs.picker: Menu for a list of actions (each does something); Select for picking one value.
Menu for a canonical list of menu items; Popover for arbitrary panel content.

components.name: Pagination
components.summary: Prev/Next arrows + windowed page buttons with ellipses. Controlled: page + totalPages + onChange.

props.name: page
props.description: 1-based current page.

props.name: totalPages
props.description: Renders nothing when ≤ 1.

components.whenToUse: Let the user jump between pages of a long list — prev/next arrows + windowed page buttons with ellipses.

vs.picker: Pagination for discrete pages; unpaginated scroll when the list is short or infinite-scroll is natural.

components.name: Popover
components.summary: Anchored floating panel, click to open. Closes on outside click / Escape.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled — pair with onOpenChange.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Uncontrolled fallback.

requires: aria-haspopup + aria-expanded set automatically on trigger

components.whenToUse: Show rich anchored content from a click trigger — details cards, mini-forms, property editors. Portaled, non-modal.

vs.picker: Popover for rich click-triggered content; Tooltip for short hover/focus-triggered text hints.
Popover for arbitrary content; Menu for a canonical list of actions.
Popover is anchored + non-modal; Dialog is centered + modal.

components.name: Tooltip
components.summary: Hover/focus-triggered hint. Text-only; wraps a focusable child and injects aria-describedby.

props.name: children
props.description: The element the tooltip describes.

props.name: delay
props.description: Delay before showing, in MILLISECONDS.

components.whenToUse: Attach a short hover/focus hint to a control — keyboard shortcut, terse explanation. Text-only.

vs.picker: Tooltip for text-only hints on hover; Popover for rich click-triggered panels.

components.name: Drawer
components.summary: Slide-in panel anchored to a viewport edge. Non-modal by default; pass `modal` to require explicit close.

props.name: size
props.description: Width for left/right, height for top/bottom.

components.whenToUse: Slide in a side panel from the viewport edge — filters, inspector, settings — without covering the underlying page.

vs.picker: Drawer for edge-anchored panels (non-modal by default); Dialog for centered modal focus.
Drawer for full-height edge panels; Popover for small anchored floaters.

components.name: ProgressBar
components.summary: Continuous horizontal bar for determinate progress. Omit `value` for an indeterminate shimmer.

props.name: value
props.description: 0–1. Omit for indeterminate.

components.whenToUse: Show determinate progress as a continuous bar — downloads, uploads, task %. Omit `value` for indeterminate shimmer.

vs.picker: ProgressBar for completion %; PixelBar for real-time level meters.
ProgressBar when you know the %; Loader when duration is unknown.

components.name: Loader
components.summary: Indeterminate loading indicator — four pixel-square cells that rise + brighten on a staggered 1s cycle. (Formerly named Spinner.)
components.whenToUse: Indicate a general "please wait, working on it" state when duration is unknown.

vs.picker: Loader for unknown duration; ProgressBar for known %.
Loader in-place of a button/readout while it waits; Skeleton in-place of content layout before it arrives.

components.name: Skeleton
components.summary: Placeholder block with a shimmer, used while content loads. Compose multiples to mirror the final layout.
components.whenToUse: Hold the shape of content that's still loading — row heights, card footprints — so the page doesn't jump when data arrives.

vs.picker: Skeleton mirrors the eventual layout; Loader is a small spinner-style indicator.

components.name: SignalBars
components.summary: Cellular/wifi-style ascending bars. Use for strength, battery, or any 1-of-N reading.

props.name: level
props.description: 0…bars; fractional values round.

components.whenToUse: Display a "strength of N" reading — cellular bars, battery, reception level.

vs.picker: SignalBars for a 1-of-N strength indicator with ascending bar heights; PixelBar for a horizontal row of equal-height cells.
SignalBars for a discrete 0–5 level; ProgressBar for continuous %.

components.name: ScanLine
components.summary: Decorative CRT scan-line overlay. Wraps children with a translucent grid + a sweeping beam.

props.name: speed
props.description: Sweep duration in seconds.

props.name: color
props.description: CSS color for the sweeping beam.

components.whenToUse: Wrap a surface in a decorative CRT scan-line + sweep overlay — live camera feeds, retro dashboards.

vs.picker: ScanLine for CRT/retro styling; HazardStripes for "caution/armed" overlay on destructive zones.

components.name: TypewriterText
components.summary: Character-by-character reveal animation. Respects `prefers-reduced-motion` by rendering the full text immediately.

props.name: speed
props.description: ms per character.

props.name: color
props.description: CSS color for the typed text. Default inherits.

props.name: cursorColor
props.description: CSS color for the blinking cursor. Default info token.

requires: aria-label carries the full text so SR reads it once

components.whenToUse: Reveal short text character-by-character for dramatic effect — boot-up messages, AI turn-in-progress, intro hooks.

vs.picker: TypewriterText for static pre-known text; Chat's streaming handles real AI-generated tokens.

components.name: Countdown
components.summary: T-minus timer. Renders HH:MM:SS (or DD:HH:MM:SS when > 24h); auto-flips to danger in the final minute.
components.whenToUse: Count down to a specific Date in real time — launch timers, expiry countdowns, game rounds.

vs.picker: Countdown auto-ticks toward a target Date; Counter is a manual numeric rocker.

components.name: Stack
components.summary: Utility flex wrapper — direction, gap, alignment in one prop surface. No visual chrome.

props.name: gap
props.description: Number → px; string → any CSS length.

props.name: inline
props.description: Render as inline-flex instead of flex.

requires: pass `as` + aria-label when Stack acts as a semantic group

examples.name: vertical
examples.snippet: <Stack gap={12}><DotLeader label="LAT" value="42 MS" /><DotLeader label="LOSS" value="0%" /></Stack>

components.whenToUse: Replace inline `style={{ display: 'flex', gap: ... }}` scaffolding — a utility wrapper for direction + gap + align + justify + wrap.

vs.picker: Stack is structural (no chrome); Card is visual (border + optional fill).

examples.name: vertical
examples.snippet: <Stack gap={12}><DotLeader label="LAT" value="42 MS" /><DotLeader label="LOSS" value="0%" /></Stack>

components.name: Accordion
components.summary: Expand/collapse sections. Controlled via expandedIds + onExpandedChange; `allowMultiple={false}` for exclusive mode.

props.name: expandedIds
props.description: Controlled. Uncontrolled fallback uses defaultExpandedIds.

props.name: allowMultiple
props.description: When false, opening one item closes the others.

requires: aria-expanded + aria-controls set automatically on each header

components.whenToUse: Stack several expand/collapse sections — settings groups, FAQ, long-form details panels.

vs.picker: Accordion shows multiple sections simultaneously (or none); Tabs shows exactly one at a time.

components.name: Toast
components.summary: Inline status notification. Controlled via `visible`; apps handle queuing/timing.
components.whenToUse: Surface a short transient status — session resumed, copied to clipboard, connection lost. App controls timing.

vs.picker: Toast for transient confirmations; Dialog when the user must acknowledge or choose.
Toast for global notices; FormField `error` for inline validation.
